entries.summary: Completed Phase 2: Automated Saleor Integration Test with Debug Mode. Implemented DEBUG_MODE env var support in test runner, added request/response logging to saleorClient and logger, fixed pre-existing debug console.log statements to be guarded by isDebugModeEnabled(), and created end-to-end integration test that validates the complete flow: select first restaurant, get categories/dishes, add to cart, place order with test comment.
top_rejection_reasons: Pre-existing unguarded console.log statements in saleorClient
Logic error in E2E test - using wrong dish name/price for cart items
lessons_learned: Pre-existing console.log statements in saleorClient needed to be guarded with debug mode check for security consistency.
The critic's feedback on Cloudflare Workers file system limitations helped choose the right approach for debug logging (console vs file).
E2E tests need to store dish details during collection phase to use later in cart operations - cannot fetch again in loop.
